Description: Encode AVIXA/CEDIA standards into structured reference documents for the AI agent

Summary: Gather AVIXA F502.01 Audio Coverage standard
Description: Obtain AVIXA F502.01 from member library. Extract SPL targets, coverage formulas, room type references.
Acceptance Criteria: Standard document obtained and key formulas identified

Description: Obtain AVIXA V201.01. Extract viewing distance formulas, image size tables, content type classifications.
Acceptance Criteria: Standard document obtained and viewing distance tables extracted

Description: Obtain CEDIA best practices manual. Extract installation standards relevant to room types.
Acceptance Criteria: Document obtained and key sections identified

Summary: Gather CEDIA networking and wiring standards
Description: Obtain CEDIA AV-over-IP and structured wiring guidelines.
Acceptance Criteria: Documents obtained

Description: Gather acoustic data from QSC Q-SYS Designer, Bose Modeler, JBL EASE Focus. Extract coverage patterns and SPL data.
Acceptance Criteria: Coverage angle and SPL data for top 10 speaker models captured

Description: Set up directory and file naming convention for Tier 2 reference docs.
Acceptance Criteria: Directory created with README explaining structure

Description: Encode AVIXA F502.01 into structured markdown: SPL targets by room type, coverage formulas, speaker spacing calculations, worked examples.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent produces speaker count within 10% of CTS-D manual calculation

Description: Encode AVIXA V201.01 into structured markdown: viewing distance tables, display size recommendations, content type classifications.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent recommends correct display size for given viewing distance and content type

Description: Rack spacing, ventilation, power, and cable management standards.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent correctly sizes rack space for given equipment list

Description: Structured wiring standards: cable types, gauge requirements, run lengths, conduit sizing.
Acceptance Criteria: Reference doc complete with tables and formulas

Description: AV-over-IP requirements: bandwidth, VLAN design, QoS, multicast.
Acceptance Criteria: Reference doc complete

Summary: Build context loader for Tier 2 docs
Description: When agent encounters a room type, automatically load relevant Tier 2 docs into context. Map room types to applicable standards.
Acceptance Criteria: Relevant standards load in <500ms when room type is selected

Summary: Add standards citation to agent responses
Description: Agent includes standard references in recommendations (e.g., Per AVIXA F502.01...).
Acceptance Criteria: Agent cites standard name and section in design recommendations

Summary: Validate: Fitness center speaker calc vs manual
Description: Test: 2000 sqft fitness, 14ft exposed ceilings. Compare agent output to CTS-D manual calculation.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent speaker count within 10% of manual calc

Description: Test: Conference room, farthest viewer at 20ft. Verify display size follows V201.01.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent recommends correct display size per AVIXA standard

Description: Build conversational AI agent with Claude API integrated into design canvas. Dual-mode operation.
Collapsible chat panel on right side of canvas. Message history, typing indicator, context summary showing active zone and device count.
Acceptance Criteria: Chat panel opens/closes, messages display correctly, context updates on zone selection

Description: API key management, system prompt with library/room types/intelligence, conversation history, streaming responses.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent responds to queries with <3 second latency, maintains conversation context

Description: Agent can call function to place equipment on canvas at specified coordinates.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent places equipment on canvas with correct symbol and position

Description: Agent can create zones on canvas with specified bounds, name, type, sqft.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent creates zones that match specified parameters

Description: Agent can trigger BOQ recalculation and read results.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent accurately reports BOQ totals

Description: Designer triggers "Check my design" — agent analyzes canvas and reports gaps, oversights, sizing issues.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent identifies: missing NVR for cameras, undersized switches, speaker coverage gaps

Description: Agent runs design questionnaire, performs coverage calcs, selects equipment, places on canvas with reasoning.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent produces complete design for 5-zone hospitality project approved by CTS-D designer

Description: Agent swaps equipment across zones with equivalent models (e.g., swap JBL for QSC).
Acceptance Criteria: Substitution maintains coverage requirements and updates BOQ correctly

Description: Agent calculates amp, DSP, switch, NVR requirements based on device totals and specs.
Acceptance Criteria: Infrastructure correctly sized: amp watts match speaker load, switch PoE budget sufficient, NVR storage adequate

Description: Agent proactively suggests when user adds equipment: camera→NVR, speakers→amp, etc.
Acceptance Criteria: Adding a camera triggers NVR suggestion. Adding speakers triggers amp suggestion.

Description: Test: 3000 sqft restaurant, 12ft exposed ceilings. Agent must ask about finishes and use case before designing.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent asks ≥3 environmental questions before placing equipment

Description: Place 10 cameras, no NVR. Trigger check. Verify agent flags gap with storage calculation.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent identifies missing NVR and calculates required storage

Description: Create 5 zones with 50+ devices. Verify agent stays under token limit and remains responsive.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent responds correctly with full project context loaded

Description: Vector-indexed document store for full AVIXA/CEDIA library and historical project data.
Compare ChromaDB, Pinecone, FAISS. Select based on: cost, latency, ease of deployment, scale needs.
Acceptance Criteria: Decision documented with rationale

Description: Extract text from AVIXA/CEDIA PDFs, chunk by section/heading, 500-token chunks with 50-token overlap.
Acceptance Criteria: Text extracted from 10 sample documents with correct section boundaries

Description: Generate embeddings, index with metadata (source, section, page, standard ID, topic).
Acceptance Criteria: Documents indexed and searchable by topic

Description: Agent query → embedding → vector search → top-K → relevance filter → context injection with citation.
Acceptance Criteria: Retrieval returns relevant chunks in <500ms with correct citations

Description: After project completion, ingest final BOQ. Schema: project name, type, zones, equipment, actuals, margins.
Acceptance Criteria: Completed project data stored and queryable

Description: Ask about speaker placement in 20ft+ ceilings. Verify RAG retrieval with citation.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent retrieves relevant standard and cites document/section

Description: Ingest 3 projects, query average camera count per parking garage. Verify accuracy.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent returns correct average from historical data

Description: AI-powered floor plan interpretation for automatic zone identification.

Summary: Implement Claude Vision floor plan analysis
Description: Send floor plan image to Claude Vision API. Identify room boundaries, doors, windows, text labels.
Acceptance Criteria: Room boundaries identified in ≥80% of test floor plans

Description: Classify rooms by type using text labels + spatial reasoning (size, adjacency, fixtures).
Acceptance Criteria: Room types correctly classified ≥70% of the time

Description: Estimate room dimensions from scale bar or known reference. Calculate sqft.
Acceptance Criteria: Sqft estimates within ±15% of actual

Description: Overlay proposed zones on floor plan. Designer accepts, rejects, modifies. Corrections feed back.
Acceptance Criteria: Designer can accept/reject/edit each proposed zone

Description: Test with hotel, office, residential, restaurant, mixed-use floor plans. Measure accuracy.
Acceptance Criteria: ≥80% room identification, ≥70% type classification, ±15% sqft across 5 plans

Description: Multi-project dashboard, templates, revision history, customer database, margin tracking.
List all projects with status, last modified, total value, margin. Sort and filter.
Acceptance Criteria: User can view and manage 10+ projects from dashboard

Description: Pre-built templates (hotel, office, restaurant, residential) that load room types and typical equipment.
Acceptance Criteria: Template creates project with pre-populated zones and room types

Description: Track changes between proposal versions. Compare BOQ diffs.
Acceptance Criteria: User can view diff between two proposal versions

Description: Client info, project history, contact details. Link projects to clients.
Acceptance Criteria: Client record shows all associated projects and total revenue

Description: Equipment margin, labor margin, blended margin by project and across portfolio.
Acceptance Criteria: Portfolio view shows margin trends across projects

Description: QuickBooks, distributor pricing feeds, manufacturer spec import, cloud storage, CRM.
Push approved proposals to QuickBooks as invoices/estimates.
Acceptance Criteria: Approved proposal creates QuickBooks invoice with correct line items

Description: Scheduled import from ADI, Anixter, SnapOne Portal. Update library costs.
Acceptance Criteria: Library costs update within 24 hours of distributor price change

Description: Parse manufacturer product pages into library entries via URL.
Acceptance Criteria: Agent correctly parses product specs from manufacturer URL

Description: Google Drive / Dropbox / OneDrive sync for project files and proposals.
Acceptance Criteria: Project files sync to selected cloud storage provider

Description: Salesforce or HubSpot pipeline sync. Projects mapped to CRM opportunities.
Acceptance Criteria: Project status syncs to CRM opportunity stage

Description: Automated regression tests for all completed phases. Run after every build.
Automated tests for: PDF/image loading, symbol placement, zone drawing, zoom/pan/scale, BOQ export.
Acceptance Criteria: All canvas features pass after new build

Description: Automated tests for: document generation, pricing accuracy, formatting validation.
Acceptance Criteria: Proposal generates without errors and pricing matches BOQ

Description: Automated tests for: CSV/TSV/unstructured parsing, manufacturer recognition, export formats.
Acceptance Criteria: All input formats parse correctly, Control4/SnapOne classified correctly

Description: Run completed hotel project through system. Compare output to actual installed BOQ.
Acceptance Criteria: Output within tolerances: ±15% equipment count, ±10% cost, ±20% labor

Description: Run completed office project through system. Compare output to actual.
Acceptance Criteria: Output within tolerances

Description: Run completed restaurant project through system. Compare output to actual.
Acceptance Criteria: Output within tolerances
